title: Every Claude Tool Explained: Master Full Ecosystem in 20 Minutes
summary: The video covers Claude's integrated ecosystem including Chat, Code, Cowork, Design, and Routines products. It demonstrates how Claude's features work together for research, coding, collaboration, automation, and content creation, positioning Claude as an operating system for work rather than a standalone chatbot.
writeup: This walkthrough from AI Master maps Claude's product suite as one integrated system: Chat, Code, Cowork, Design, and Routines, covering how each fits research, coding, collaboration, automation, and content creation. The framing argument is that Claude functions as an operating system for work rather than a single chatbot, with the tools meant to hand off to each other across a workflow. Supporting concepts include the Model Context Protocol, test-time compute, AI agents, prompt engineering, and workflow automation. The goal is a compact tour of the full ecosystem and how the pieces connect.
